creator: tolid@plab.ku.dk
text:
I'm sorry, I didn't see this port in the ports collection.:(.
I canceled my submitting for this port.
On Sun, Apr 08, 2001 at 02:50:03PM -0700, Anton Berezin wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/26441; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Anton Berezin <tobez@tobez.org>
> To: Anatoliy Dmytriyev <tolid@plab.ku.dk>
> Cc: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org
> Subject: Re: ports/26441: New port: Read the dimensions of an image in several popular formats
> Date: Sun, 8 Apr 2001 23:48:22 +0200
> 
>  On Sun, Apr 08, 2001 at 11:18:14PM +0200, Anatoliy Dmytriyev wrote:
>  
>  > >Number:         26441
>  > >Category:       ports
>  > >Synopsis:       New port: Read the dimensions of an image in several popular formats
>  
>  How is it different (apart from the version of the package) from
>  graphics/p5-Image-Size?
>  
>  Cheers,
>  \Anton.
> 
> To Unsubscribe: send mail to majordomo@FreeBSD.org
> with "unsubscribe freebsd-ports" in the body of the message

Anatoliy Dmytriyev <tolid@plab.ku.dk>
